summary: Localize approval configuration, make business owner configuration authoritative for platform roles, and polish sidebar settings plus dark-mode table rendering.

notes: Approval template names and node labels are now presented with Chinese business terminology while preserving internal keys.
The collaboration approval template is displayed as 总工办/项目管理部协作审批 and routes source-side department ownership through the submitter organization.
Added psa_sync_business_platform_roles to synchronize organization managers and project owners into manager/lead platform roles.
Project, organization, employee update, and employee creation RPC paths now trigger business role synchronization.
Dropped the older narrow psa_sync_project_platform_roles function instead of keeping a redundant compatibility wrapper.
Approval-flow configuration uses Chinese labels for templates, resolver roles, resolver types, and approval policies, with raw keys demoted to secondary context.
Saving project owner configuration invalidates employee data so role changes can refresh promptly.
Sidebar footer now lays out user name and department horizontally and opens the settings menu on hover or focus.
Dark-mode tokens and timesheet table sticky cells now use theme colors instead of hard-coded light backgrounds.

verification: Run npm --prefix frontend run build with VITE_APP_VERSION=V0.18.18.
Run npm exec -- playwright test e2e/sidebar-menu-geometry.spec.ts --project=chromium from frontend/.
Run scripts/assert-approval-config-localized-collaboration.sql on a database with migration 121 applied.
Run scripts/assert-collaboration-approval-routing.sql on a database with migration 121 applied.
Run scripts/assert-project-role-platform-sync.sql on a database with migration 121 applied.
known_warnings: Local psql is not installed on this workstation, so SQL asserts must be run on a database host or CI environment.
